text.name: cco_blocked_fields_header
text.text: Field Crop Size ha Candidate Reason

text.name: cco_cleanup_console_alternatives
text.text: Console alternatives remain available: ccoScanBlocked, ccoResetBlocked dryrun, ccoResetBlocked.

text.name: cco_cleanup_step_1
text.text: 1. Use RESET SCOPE to choose ALL, a crop, or an individual field.

text.name: cco_cleanup_step_2
text.text: 2. Run RESET BLOCKED DRY-RUN before changing the save state.

text.name: cco_cleanup_step_3
text.text: 3. Use CONFIRM RESET only after the dry-run result looks correct.

text.name: cco_confirm_reset_available
text.text: CONFIRM RESET is now available for scope=%s resetMode=%s. It will apply the selected reset mode.

text.name: cco_defaults_readonly_admin
text.text: CCO defaults are read-only for remote multiplayer clients. Log in as server admin/master user to change them.

text.name: cco_defaults_readonly_remote
text.text: CCO defaults are read-only for remote multiplayer clients.

text.name: cco_dialog_test_body
text.text: If you can read this, the custom CCO GUI screen is rendering correctly. This screen replaces the experimental InfoDialog approach used in alpha.11-alpha.13.

text.name: cco_edit_rejected_not_admin
text.text: CCO edit rejected: this player is not logged in as a server admin/master user.

text.name: cco_empty_blockedrules
text.text: No crops are currently disabled for NPC use.

text.name: cco_empty_disabled
text.text: No disabled crops are configured for this save.

text.name: cco_empty_limited
text.text: No size-limited crops are configured for this save.

text.name: cco_empty_rules
text.text: No configured crop rules match this view.

text.name: cco_empty_undiscovered
text.text: All configured crops are currently loaded on this map/save.

text.name: cco_failed_template_backup
text.text: Failed to create template backup; config.xml was not changed.

text.name: cco_failed_write_defaults_per_save
text.text: Failed to write template defaults into active per-save XML.

text.name: cco_force_apply_hint
text.text: Click FORCE APPLY to save anyway.

text.name: cco_gui_subtitle
text.text: Crop policy editor | Apply writes per-save XML | Load Defaults imports config.xml

text.name: cco_help_cleanup_console
text.text: Console alternatives remain available: ccoScanBlocked and ccoResetBlocked dryrun.

text.name: cco_help_cleanup_dryrun
text.text: Run RESET BLOCKED DRY-RUN first. It does not change the save state.

text.name: cco_help_cleanup_scope
text.text: Use RESET SCOPE to cycle through ALL, CROP, and FIELD cleanup targets.

text.name: cco_help_column_loaded
text.text: Loaded: whether the crop exists on the active map/save.

text.name: cco_help_column_max_field
text.text: Max Field: maximum actual NPC field size. Values are stored in hectares; acres are shown for reference.

text.name: cco_help_column_npc
text.text: NPC Permitted: whether NPCs may plant the crop, or whether the map default is used.

text.name: cco_help_column_player
text.text: Player Permitted: whether the crop is available under the crop policy.

text.name: cco_help_config_load_defaults
text.text: LOAD DEFAULTS imports config.xml into this save and overwrites the active per-save XML.

text.name: cco_help_config_save_defaults
text.text: SAVE DEFAULTS exports the full active save rules to config.xml and creates a backup.

text.name: cco_help_config_savegame
text.text: saves/savegameX.xml is the active rule file for the current save.

text.name: cco_help_config_template
text.text: config.xml is the template/default rule file.

text.name: cco_help_editing_all_rules
text.text: Use ALL RULES to select a crop and stage changes in the right panel.

text.name: cco_help_editing_apply
text.text: APPLY writes safe changes to the active per-save XML.

text.name: cco_help_editing_discard
text.text: DISCARD resets staged values for the selected crop.

text.name: cco_help_editing_force_apply
text.text: FORCE APPLY deliberately saves a rule that creates blocked NPC fields.

text.name: cco_help_navigation_back
text.text: Use BACK or ESC to close the CCO screen.

text.name: cco_help_navigation_tabs
text.text: Use the tab headings or PREV TAB / NEXT TAB to switch sections.

text.name: cco_help_term_blocked
text.text: Blocked NPC Fields: existing NPC fields that currently violate the active policy.

text.name: cco_help_term_disabled
text.text: Disabled: the crop is unavailable under the crop policy.

text.name: cco_help_term_not_loaded
text.text: Not Loaded: the rule is preserved, but the crop is not present on this map/save.

text.name: cco_help_term_npc_disabled
text.text: NPC Disabled: NPCs should not plant this crop. Globally disabled crops also count as NPC-disabled.

text.name: cco_help_term_size_limited
text.text: Size Limited: NPCs may plant the crop only below the configured hectare limit.

text.name: cco_loaded_template_into_save
text.text: Loaded template config.xml into active save config: %s

text.name: cco_loaded_template_no_save
text.text: Loaded template config.xml. No savegame context was available, so no per-save XML was written.

text.name: cco_mode_title_undiscovered
text.text: Configured but not loaded on this map

text.name: cco_more_blocked_fields
text.text: ... %d more blocked NPC field(s). Use ccoScanBlocked for the full console list.

text.name: cco_no_blocked_npc_fields
text.text: No blocked NPC fields were detected under the current crop policy.

text.name: cco_page_next_hint
text.text: Page %d/%d. Use ccoGui %s %d for next page.

text.name: cco_readonly_server_rules
text.text: Read-only server rules. Only the server/host can change CCO settings.

text.name: cco_remote_reset_readonly
text.text: Remote multiplayer clients are read-only. Reset actions can only be run by the server/host.

text.name: cco_reset_readonly_admin
text.text: CCO reset is read-only for remote multiplayer clients. Log in as server admin/master user to change fields.

text.name: cco_reset_readonly_remote
text.text: CCO reset is read-only for remote multiplayer clients.

text.name: cco_rule_saved_info
text.text: The selected crop rule was saved to the active CCO XML and rules were reapplied.

text.name: cco_rules_readonly_admin
text.text: CCO rules are read-only for remote multiplayer clients. Log in as server admin/master user to change them.

text.name: cco_rules_readonly_remote
text.text: CCO rules are read-only for remote multiplayer clients.

text.name: cco_saved_rules_to_template
text.text: Saved current active rules to template config.xml. Existing per-save XML files were not overwritten

text.name: cco_select_crop_info
text.text: Select a crop row, then use the selector/value controls to stage changes.

text.name: cco_sent_operation_request
text.text: Sent CCO %s request to the server.

text.name: cco_server_sync_open_again
text.text: Open CCO again once the server snapshot has been received, or use ccoReload to request the server rules again.

text.name: cco_server_sync_remote_client
text.text: This is a remote multiplayer client. Local CCO config.xml and savegame?.xml files are not used in this session.

text.name: cco_stage_changes_info
text.text: Use the selector/value controls to stage changes, then APPLY.

text.name: cco_staged_changes_ready
text.text: Staged changes ready. Apply will save XML.

text.name: cco_status_actions_apply
text.text: APPLY / FORCE APPLY writes staged crop changes to this save only.

text.name: cco_status_actions_load_defaults
text.text: LOAD DEFAULTS imports template config.xml into this save and overwrites the active per-save rules.

text.name: cco_status_actions_save_defaults
text.text: SAVE DEFAULTS exports the current save rules to template config.xml.

text.name: cco_status_cleanup_dryrun
text.text: Use RESET BLOCKED DRY-RUN first, then CONFIRM RESET if the result looks correct. Dry-run also reports a reseed candidate for future reseed mode.

text.name: cco_status_cleanup_scope
text.text: Use RESET SCOPE to choose ALL, CROP, or FIELD.

text.name: cco_status_config_hierarchy_apply
text.text: APPLY / FORCE APPLY writes the selected rule to the active per-save XML.

text.name: cco_status_config_hierarchy_per_save
text.text: Existing per-save XML files are not overwritten by SAVE DEFAULTS.

text.name: cco_status_config_hierarchy_save_defaults
text.text: SAVE DEFAULTS writes the full active rule set to config.xml for future/default use.

text.name: cco_status_navigation_help
text.text: Use the top tabs, or PREV TAB / NEXT TAB, to move between sections. Use BACK to close.

text.name: cco_title_npc_disabled_rules
text.text: Crop Control Override - NPC Disabled Rules

text.name: cco_title_waiting_server_rules
text.text: Crop Control Override - Waiting for Server Rules

text.name: cco_validation_found_blocked
text.text: Validation found blocked NPC fields. Review the VALIDATION tab before using ccoResetBlocked dryrun.

text.name: cco_validation_found_blocked_count
text.text: Validation found %s blocked NPC field(s). Review the VALIDATION tab before using ccoResetBlocked dryrun.

text.name: cco_viewing_server_rules
text.text: Viewing server-side CCO rules. Remote clients cannot edit or write local XML in multiplayer.

text.name: cco_waiting_mp_connection_send
text.text: Waiting for multiplayer server connection before sending CCO %s request.

text.name: cco_waiting_mp_connection_sync
text.text: Waiting for multiplayer server connection before syncing CCO rules.

text.name: cco_sowing_not_permitted
text.text: Crop Control Override: Die Aussaat von %s ist nicht erlaubt.
